description:
Minor but easy DRY fixes:

1. `ao.cli.v1` is defined as a const in two crates (shared/output.rs and orchestrator-web-contracts) plus appears as raw string literal in 8+ test/MCP files. Move to protocol crate as single pub const.

2. `MAX_UNIX_SOCKET_PATH_LEN = 100` is independently defined in orchestrator-core/services/runner_helpers.rs and orchestrator-cli/shared/runner.rs. Move to protocol or orchestrator-core as single pub const.

3. `Duration::from_millis(900)` appears 3x in runner_helpers.rs with no named constant. Extract as `const RUNNER_IPC_TIMEOUT: Duration`.

4. `parse_cli_type` is duplicated between llm-cli-wrapper/main.rs and cli/launch.rs. Delete the main.rs copy and call launch::parse_cli_type.
title: Centralize `ao.cli.v1` schema string and `MAX_UNIX_SOCKET_PATH_LEN` constant
